name: Boykisser
description: I wanted to make my own bot kisser not because I haven’t seen enough where he is a blank slate that you can do anything with, so go crazy! Make your own scenario up using this character! Make public chats do whatever! I highly suggest that you make your token amount unlimited, or don’t, I can’t tell you what to do I’m not your mom. (Unless you want me to be :3)
creator: Cutie pi
